song.title: Verily I Say Unto You
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Oh, what a Savior that He died for me! From condemnation He hath made me free; “He that believeth on the Son” saith He, “Hath everlasting life.”
[C] Chorus “Verily, verily, I say unto you;” “Verily, verily,” message ever new! “He that believeth on the Son”— ’tis true— “Hath everlasting life!”
[V2] 2) All my iniquities on Him were laid, All my indebtedness by Him was paid; All who believe on Him, the Lord hath said, “Hath everlasting life.”
[V3] 3) Though poor and needy, I can trust my Lord; Though weak and sinful, I believe His word; Oh, glad message; Every child of God “Hath everlasting life.”
[V4] 4) Though all unworthy, Yet I will not doubt; For him that cometh He will not cast out: “He that believeth”— Oh, the good news shout! “Hath everlasting life.”
song.author: James McGranahan
